settings.text:
Affiliates Program

Join our affiliate program and start earning money by promoting our products to your audience. It’s free to join and easy to get started.

How It Works

  1. Sign up for our affiliate program — it’s completely free
  2. Get your unique referral link and promotional materials
  3. Share with your audience through social media, email, or your website
  4. Earn commissions for every sale made through your link

Commission Structure

We offer competitive commissions for our affiliate partners:

  • Standard commission: 15% per sale
  • High-volume bonus: up to 25% for top performers
  • 30-day cookie window to track referrals
  • Monthly payouts via PayPal or bank transfer

Who Can Join?

Anyone can apply! Whether you’re a fitness blogger, social media influencer, or simply someone who loves our products, we’d love to have you on board.

Apply Now

Ready to start earning? Contact us at affiliates@trainixy.com with your name, social media handles or website, and a brief description of your audience.
